name: Crystal Ball on Stand 30mm
description: Nothing is credited with the magical power of divination more than the humble Crystal Ball.  The picture of the fortune telling gypsy gazing in to the ball and foretelling your future is only one aspect of this pure symbolic item. It is mentioned in the book of revelations and referred to in the legend of King Arthur, who sought out the advice and prophecies of Merlin the Magician via his crystal ball...Prominent in the middle ages, Scryers (fortune tellers) revered their crystal balls, often passing them on to their apprentices. A tool for reaching and communicating with the divine, indeed crystals have always been used in communications  just as they are today in radios, telephones and computers.Possibly the reason crystal balls became important tools is because of their inherent characteristics of transparency and symmetry. Additionally it is claimed the energetic fields of crystals and gemstones influence what the scryer sees on a very subtle and often esoteric level.Warning!It may seem self-evident but it is worth noting that because of the optical nature of crystal balls, if left in direct sunlight there is a slight possible fire hazard.

name: Sphere Pendulum - Rose Quartz
description: Crystal dowsing can be performed in many ways and it is claimed for all sorts of purposes, such as finding water, minerals, missing people and even lost objects. It is also used in healing, reiki and divination. Fitted with a silver chain & gemstone bead at the top end they really do have something quite magical about them.High-quality gemstone pendulums in a variety of stones. Each one has attached a chain approx 170mm long, the chain has a gemstone bead at the end. PLEASE NOTE - These pendulums are handmade from a natural product. Because of this, the sizes of the gemstone pieces may vary.

name: Pack of 24 L Tumble Stone - Amethyst Banded
description: Gemstones are a part of many ancient cultures, often considered to be a talisman or symbol of good luck or fortune. Different gems are said to have different properties, and for thousands of years, they have been made into rings, bracelets, amulets, brooches & pendants to capture their magic. A popular theory is that gemstones contain vibrational energy. By placing gemstones within a person's aura it is possible to change the vibrations of that aura.Whatever your beliefs gemstones are attractive, interesting and fun to study and collect!

Different gems are said to have different properties, and for thousands of years, they have been made into rings, bracelets, amulets, brooches & pendants to capture their magic. name: One Inch Lingam - 3 Stones
description: The AWGifts-Dropshipping Shiva Lingam stone is a sacred stone of both the ancient and modern worlds. They are found in the Narmada River in Onkar Mandhata, one of the seven holy sites of India.These stones are made of cryptocrystalline quartz and legend has it that they formed when a meteorite fell to earth several million years ago. The natural movement of the river is believed to help create the egg or oval shape of the stones. They're only gathered on one day each year and are hand polished to give them a smooth and gleaming surface. Lingam stones are said to have one of the highest frequency vibration rates of all the stones on earth. They emanate a vibration that will purify your sacred space.The shape of the stone represents male energy (knowledge) and the markings, which differ greatly from stone to stone, represent female energy (Wisdom). The Shiva Lingam also represents harmony and balance and facilitates the union of opposites, such as masculine and feminine or body and soul. It is excellent for sexual healing.Dimensions displayed are per single stone.Each Shiva Lingam Stone is completely unique !

name: Medicine Buddha Singing Bowl Set 10cm (min 500gm)
description: Medicine Singing Bowl, the veneration of Medicine Buddha, the Supreme- Healer (Sangye Menla in Tibetan) Is considered a powerful method not only for healing and increasing healing powers both for oneself and others, but also for overcoming the inner sickness of attachment, hatred and ignorance.It is believed that meditating on the Medicine Buddha can help decrease physical and mental illness and suffering.  According to the Tibetan tradition, the existence of Singing bowls dates back to the time of the historical Buddha Shakyamuni (560-480 B.C) The tradition was brought from India to Tibet in the 8th century A.D.Singing Bowls produce sounds which invoke a state of relaxation which naturally assists one in entering into meditation.They are a quintessential aid to Meditation and can be found on Buddhist avatars, in temples monasteries and Yoga halls through the word.This Singing Bowl has been Handmade in Nepal by traditional Artisan craft people.

name: Calcite Geodes - 3-4 cm
description: A beautiful Geode filled with Calcite and Quartz crystals from Morocco, straight from mother earth. Geodes produce a great look when cracked open. Opening them is easy, they are hollower than other geodes.                They also tend to produce more crystals.A geode is a round rock which contains a hollow cavity lined with crystals. Rocks which are completely filled with small compact crystal. Calcite is a carbonate mineral and the most stable polymorph of calcium carbonate. Calcite is thought to amplify thought, improve memory and intellectual capacity; promote mental growth and development.Small Geodes like (number 5) are often sold in novelty and science stores to people who want to have the experience of opening a geode themselves. They want to be the first human to see the treasure inside. The size, shape and colour of the product you will receive may differ slightly from the product shown in the image.

name: Orgonite Power Chakra Pendulum - Amethyst
description: Orgonite has become very popular as a spiritual healing tool, and as protection against electromagnetic pollution. Orgonites are used to cleanse negative energy and are also used to counteract the effects electromagnetic waves have on our body. Orgonite is believed to help improve your life physically, emotionally and spiritually.Orgonite is a mixture of catalyzed fiberglass resin with metal shavings, poured into molds. Crystals, essential oils, high vibration organic materials can be added to the mixture for their ability to make the energy more coherent or to enhance the working of the orgonite. Dowsing or radiesthesia is believed to date back over six thousand years. The Egyptians and ancient Chinese were early practitioners. Orgonite Gemstone dowsing can be performed in many ways and it is claimed for all sorts of purposes, such as finding water, minerals, missing people and even lost objects. It is also used in healing, reiki and divination.

Mineral Specimens - Flower Calcite (approx 20 pieces)
description: This interesting mineral is white to light brown in color. Indeed, its shape resembles a beautiful flower. Calcite is believed to stimulate the intellect, help organize thoughts and give energy. It is believed to increase self-esteem and strength.

name: Mineral Specimens - Azurite Malachite (approx 20 pieces)
description: Azurite Malachite is a mixture of azurite and malachite, usually in the form of dense clusters. It has a beautiful blue-green colour. This stone has a high collector's value, but according to lithotherapy, it also has a positive effect on the condition of the human body and spirit. Very often in esoteric circles, azurite malachite is called a stone of positive energy.

name: Mineral Specimens -Vanadinite (approx 20 pieces)
description: Vanadinite is a mineral from the vanadate group. It occurs very rarely and only locally forms large clusters. The name comes from the element vanadium, which is the basic ingredient of this mineral. Vanadinite is believed to enhance spiritual vision. It helps in meditation, understanding and communicating with higher forces.

name: Mineral Specimens - Mixed Pieces (approx 24 pieces)
description: In this set you will find pieces of various minerals. Check what you find! The perfect gift for collectors.

name: Mineral Specimens - Amethyst (approx 20 pieces)
description: Amethyst is a purple-coloured variety of quartz. It owes its colour to iron admixtures. The mineral is most often found in the form of druse, mainly within volcanic rocks. Its name comes from Greek and means "sober", because according to Greek beliefs, drinking wine from amethyst cups prevented the drinker from getting drunk. Amethyst is called the "stone of harmony and relaxation".

name: Mineral Specimens - Calcite (approx 32 pieces)
description: Calcite is common all over the world and occupies more than 4% of the total mass of the earth's crust. This mineral can be found in many colours such as red, orange, green, yellow, blue, brown. There are also colourless and white lynx specimens. Calcite appears as a transparent or opaque crystal. The most common are specimens containing admixtures of manganese, iron and magnesium, strontium, barium, cobalt and lead. Calcite is considered to be the stone of balance. It has the ability to strengthen and purify energy.

name: Mineral Specimens - Cobalt Calcite (approx 25 pieces)
description: Cobalt calcite is a pink to purple variety of calcite. The purple-pink colour is due to, as the name suggests, the presence of cobalt. This mineral is also called the Stone of Aphrodite and symbolizes unconditional love and forgiveness.

name: Mineral Specimens - Small Prynite (approx 100 pieces)
description: Prehnite is a mineral from the rodingite family. The most common are prehnites in a green-yellow range of colors, translucent, sometimes showing the effect of a cat's eye. Sometimes there are also black ingrades of other minerals.It is called the stone of unconditional love. It is believed to have strong protective properties. It harmonizes particularly well with the heart and third eye chakra.

name: Mineral Specimens - Epidote (approx 10 pieces)
description: Epidote is a common mineral from the group of silicates with a widespread distribution. It is brittle, transparent, and changes its colour from dark green to yellow-green depending on the direction of observation. In esoteric, it is recommended as an addition to meditation. Then you can hold the stone in your hand or put it on your thigh.

name: Mineral Specimens - Aragonite (approx 20 pieces)
description: Aragonite is a metamorphic stone that occurs in stalactites or around natural hot springs. It has a mild red-orange or straw yellow colour and symbolizes truth, understanding. The stone is often called an iron flower because of its intertwined and branch-like crystal formations. Aragonite is believed to promote truth, understanding and uninterrupted perception of reality.

name: Mineral Specimens - Natural Hematite (approx 20 pieces)
description: Hematite is a crystal made of iron oxide; it is one of the most abundant minerals on the earth's surface. The stone is known for its black color and metallic sheen. Its distinguishing feature is a red scratch visible when the surface is scratched.Hematite minerals have been used for protection for thousands of years. One of the main ways this crystal has been used is to protect against excessive bleeding. It is also believed to add confidence to shy people.

name: Mineral Specimens - Barite Serisite (approx 60 pieces)
description: An extremely interesting mineral specimen - combination of barite and sericite. Baryte might be colorless, white, yellowish or reddish, while sericite is usually colorless, sometimes white, yellowish, gray or brown.These minerals are generally used for decorative purposes and have great collector's importance.

name: Mineral Specimens - Calsidone (approx 100 pieces)
description: Chalcedony is a variety of quartz, consisting of natural silicon dioxide. It comes in a variety of colours and forms, each with its own unique characteristics. Colours depend on the trace minerals present in the stone. Chalcedony is believed to be a guardian stone that promotes brotherhood and goodwill.

name: Mineral Specimens - Galene (approx 80 pieces)
description: Galena stone aids in soothing intense emotions, such as anger, tantrums, and feelings of revenge or resentment. Mentally, it supports decisive action by clearing away parasitic thoughts and lingering sources of distress. It offers stability and the structure needed to reach your objectives. On a spiritual level, Galena serves as a strong guide for navigating through darkness, though it can create a rigid mindset, solidifying beliefs and knowledge if used for extended periods during spiritual exploration. It's advised to remain mindful and attentive to one's inner self.

name: Mineral Specimens - Chalcopyrite (approx 80 pieces)
description: Chalcopyrite is a potent stone known for activating and harmonizing all chakras. Shamans and Reiki practitioners have long used it to clear chakra blockages. This crystal provides transformative energy, helping to shift habits, routines, and lifestyles.

The delicate patterns and natural hues create a soothing and tranquil environment.
